record.field: Risk Analysis For TIER 1 EASI SAVE
SELECT 1 FROM res_partner_account a INNER JOIN res_partner r ON r.id = a.customer_id WHERE r.id = %s and lower(a.category) = 'tier_1_easi_save' ORDER BY a.opening_date DESC LIMIT 1;
Analysis for customers using tier 1 easi save product
Risk Analysis For USSD SAVINGS ACCOUNT
SELECT 1 FROM res_partner_account a INNER JOIN res_partner r ON r.id = a.customer_id WHERE r.id = %s and lower(a.category) = 'ussd_savings_account' ORDER BY a.opening_date DESC LIMIT 1;
Analysis for customers using ussd savings account product
Risk Analysis For INDIVIDUAL PLATINUM HYSA
SELECT 1 FROM res_partner_account a INNER JOIN res_partner r ON r.id = a.customer_id WHERE r.id = %s and lower(a.category) = 'individual_platinum_hysa' ORDER BY a.opening_date DESC LIMIT 1;
Analysis for customers using individual platinum hysa product
Risk Analysis For PLATINUM HYSA DIASPORA
SELECT 1 FROM res_partner_account a INNER JOIN res_partner r ON r.id = a.customer_id WHERE r.id = %s and lower(a.category) = 'platinum_hysa_diaspora' ORDER BY a.opening_date DESC LIMIT 1;
Analysis for customers using platinum hysa diaspora product
Risk Analysis For APG AND CONTRACT CURRENT
SELECT 1 FROM res_partner_account a INNER JOIN res_partner r ON r.id = a.customer_id WHERE r.id = %s and lower(a.category) = 'apg_and_contract_current' ORDER BY a.opening_date DESC LIMIT 1;
Analysis for customers using apg and contract current product
Risk Analysis For IND DIASPORA CURRENT
SELECT 1 FROM res_partner_account a INNER JOIN res_partner r ON r.id = a.customer_id WHERE r.id = %s and lower(a.category) = 'ind_diaspora_current' ORDER BY a.opening_date DESC LIMIT 1;

SELECT 1 FROM res_partner_account a INNER JOIN res_partner r ON r.id = a.customer_id WHERE r.id = %s and lower(a.category) = 'corp_disaspora_current' ORDER BY a.opening_date DESC LIMIT 1;
Analysis for customers using corp disaspora current product
Risk Analysis For PLATINUM - INDIVIDUAL DIASPORA
SELECT 1 FROM res_partner_account a INNER JOIN res_partner r ON r.id = a.customer_id WHERE r.id = %s and lower(a.category) = 'platinum_individual_diaspora' ORDER BY a.opening_date DESC LIMIT 1;

SELECT 1 FROM res_partner_account a INNER JOIN res_partner r ON r.id = a.customer_id WHERE r.id = %s and lower(a.category) = 'diaspora_current' ORDER BY a.opening_date DESC LIMIT 1;

SELECT 1 FROM res_partner_account a INNER JOIN res_partner r ON r.id = a.customer_id WHERE r.id = %s and lower(a.category) = 'dbn_on_lending_scheme' ORDER BY a.opening_date DESC LIMIT 1;

SELECT 1 FROM res_partner_account a INNER JOIN res_partner r ON r.id = a.customer_id WHERE r.id = %s and lower(a.category) = 'otc_futures_margin' ORDER BY a.opening_date DESC LIMIT 1;

SELECT 1 FROM res_partner_account a INNER JOIN res_partner r ON r.id = a.customer_id WHERE r.id = %s and lower(a.category) = 'customer_fx_suspense' ORDER BY a.opening_date DESC LIMIT 1;

Risk Analysis For INDIVIDUAL CALL DEPOSIT
SELECT 1 FROM res_partner_account a INNER JOIN res_partner r ON r.id = a.customer_id WHERE r.id = %s and lower(a.category) = 'individual_call_deposit' ORDER BY a.opening_date DESC LIMIT 1;
Analysis for customers using individual call deposit product
Risk Analysis For VISA CREDIT CARD
SELECT 1 FROM res_partner_account a INNER JOIN res_partner r ON r.id = a.customer_id WHERE r.id = %s and lower(a.category) = 'visa_credit_card' ORDER BY a.opening_date DESC LIMIT 1;
Analysis for customers using visa credit card product
Risk Analysis For DISAPORA VANTAGE PLATINUM
SELECT 1 FROM res_partner_account a INNER JOIN res_partner r ON r.id = a.customer_id WHERE r.id = %s and lower(a.category) = 'disapora_vantage_platinum' ORDER BY a.opening_date DESC LIMIT 1;
Analysis for customers using disapora vantage platinum product

Analysis for customers using platinum treasure offer 2 product
